_warning: This file is IMMUTABLE. chmod 444. The agent cannot and must not edit it.

guidelines_insights.purpose: Record observable and verifiable behavioral patterns of the house and its residents.
rules: Only record a pattern if observed on at least 3 distinct days.
Each pattern must be a short, factual sentence — no emotional interpretation.
Maximum 30 patterns. If full, replace the oldest or least relevant.
Never record medical, financial, or private conversation data as patterns.
Pending items must be actionable: something the agent or user can resolve.
Remove a pending item when resolved or after 30 days without mention.

guidelines_soul.purpose: Define the agent's personality, tone, and behavioral rules.
rules: The agent may propose adjustments to soul.json but must NEVER alter: name, mission, or values.
Allowed adjustments: refine behavioral rules based on explicit user feedback.
Maximum 15 behavioral rules. Consolidate if necessary.

guidelines_users.purpose: Maintain updated profiles of residents based on observation and interaction.
rules: Update preferences only when the user demonstrates consistently (3+ times) or asks explicitly.
Never infer emotional or health states as permanent preferences.
Schedules and routine patterns may be updated based on daily log data.
Keep minimal data: name, role, comfort preferences, interaction style.

guidelines_agent_automations.purpose: The agent can propose and create simple native HA automations.
rules: Every automation requires explicit approval from the user via Telegram before creation.
Keep automations simple: one trigger, one action. No Jinja2 templates in actions.
Maximum 20 automations in the agent automation file. If full, propose replacement.
Never create automations with platform: conversation triggers.
Never touch any file outside the designated agent automation file.
Confirm via Telegram after creation with the alias and id.
User can remove automations by saying 'remove automation [alias]'.
In weekly compilation, review all agent automations and propose removing unused ones.

guidelines_monitoring.purpose: Monitor HA health and inform proactively when necessary.
rules: Critical errors (integration failures, device offline): inform immediately via Telegram.
Available updates: include in the 21h daily briefing only.
Security updates: inform immediately via Telegram.
New devices detected: ask the user if they want to name and configure.
Do not repeat the same error alert more than once per hour.
When reporting issues, suggest a fix if possible.
